yacl3.config.fireballpredictor:config.cl:
The power to use for fireballs if the server doesn't provide it.
Default: 1.0
yacl3.config.fireballpredictor:config.ra:
Multiplier for the explosion ray power calculation.
Adjust between 0.7 and 1.3 to visualize max/min damage potential.
Default: 1.15
yacl3.config.fireballpredictor:config.re:
Toggle the fiery ribbon trail drawn behind the fireball.
Default: True

Toggle the translucent 3D dome rendered at the predicted impact site.
Default: True

Toggle the blinking block-breaking animation for blocks in the impact radius.
Default: True

Toggle environmental storytelling particles (flame, lava, smoke) on stressed blocks.
Default: True
